scripts.test:mobile: playwright test --config "Topic 4-mobile testing/playwright.mobile.config.js" --project="iPhone 14 Pro Max" --grep-invert "Demo canvas"
scripts.test:mobile:demo: playwright test --config "Topic 4-mobile testing/playwright.mobile.config.js" --project="iPhone 14 Pro Max" -g "Demo canvas" --headed --workers=1

scripts.gemini:chat: node "Topic 7-AI assisted and e2e testing/scripts/gemini-e2e-cli.js" chat
scripts.gemini:e2e:generate: node "Topic 7-AI assisted and e2e testing/scripts/gemini-e2e-cli.js" generate
scripts.gemini:e2e:run: node "Topic 7-AI assisted and e2e testing/scripts/gemini-e2e-cli.js" run
scripts.gemini:e2e: node "Topic 7-AI assisted and e2e testing/scripts/gemini-e2e-cli.js" all
